# First Input Layer (Expected Synthesis)

**Customer:** Layla Al-Rashid / Acme-MENATech
**Sources:** company-website, founder-linkedin
**Languages:** Bilingual (English + Gulf Khaleeji Arabic)

---

## Company Snapshot

**Brand:** Acme-MENATech (legal: FZ-LLC, Dubai UAE)
**One-liner:** AI-native CRM for MENA SMEs sales reality
**Industry:** B2B SaaS / CRM for SMEs
**Stage:** Early growth (200+ customers, 18mo)
**Geographic focus:** UAE primary, KSA, Qatar, Kuwait

## Founder Snapshot

**Name:** Layla Al-Rashid
**Background:** 12+ yrs Cisco+Avaya enterprise MENA, Stanford MBA, AUB BSc
**Domain:** Enterprise sales, B2B SaaS, GTM, Arabic comms, CRM architecture, government procurement
**Vision:** Gap (not in public sources, surface in 1c)

## Offer Snapshot

**Primary offer:** Acme CRM (subscription)
**Outcome:** Replace Salesforce-tier CRM with MENA-native at 40% lower
**Pricing:** Visible (AED 99/seat starter)
**Differentiation:** WhatsApp-native, Arabic from day 1, 40% lower, 4-day setup

## Brand Voice Snapshot

**Tone:** Confident + contrarian (consistent both sources)
**Archetype:** Outlaw + Sage hybrid (Outlaw on website, Sage on LinkedIn)
**Vocabulary:** "Re-architecture", "WhatsApp-first", "Stop forcing your team", "Unpopular opinion", Khaleeji openers
**Language:** Bilingual code-switching

## Proof Snapshot

**Customer count:** 200+
**Notable customers:** GulfRetail, Riyadh Telecom, Doha Medical, Kuwait F&B (4 named)
**Testimonials:** 2 (1 EN + 1 AR)
**Case studies:** 1 (GulfRetail 60% cost savings) + Layla's Avaya $14M deal
**Press:** Khaleej Times feature March 2026

## Cross-Source Coherence Map

| Pair | Score | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Website vs LinkedIn (company) | 9 | Aligned |
| Website vs LinkedIn (founder) | 10 | LinkedIn detailed, website summary, aligned |
| Website vs LinkedIn (voice) | 7 | **Tonal variance**: website Outlaw vs LinkedIn Sage. Channel-appropriate but flag for 1e. |
| Website vs LinkedIn (offer) | 8 | Website detailed, LinkedIn light. Normal. |
| Website vs LinkedIn (proof) | 9 | Both reference 200+ + Khaleej Times |

**Average coherence:** 8.6 (passes 8.0)

## Gaps for Downstream Skills

### For 1c-memory-prompter
- Vision (1-yr, 3-yr): not in public, prompt founder
- Customer conversations: prompt for recent verbatim
- Sales history: prompt for 10 deals post-mortem
- Operating preferences: prompt
- Network/advisors: prompt

### For 1d-files-requester
- Pricing sheet (full tiers)
- More case studies (have 1, need 3-5)
- Cold email samples (5-10)
- Customer testimonials (5-10 with attribution)
- Product roadmap (SaaS-specific)

### For 1e-interview-generator
- Resolve voice variance (website Outlaw vs LinkedIn Sage): channel rule?
- Vision absent: ask 1-yr + 3-yr
- ICP detail beyond "MENA SMEs"
- Buying committee + sales cycle
- Top 5 objections + responses
- Tools inventory (12 categories)
